name: kraken-cli
description: Agent-first CLI for trading crypto, stocks, forex, and derivatives on Kraken. Paper trading by default; live trading opt-in via API keys.

api_key.title: Kraken Spot API key
api_key.description: Leave blank to use market data and paper trading only (no account needed).

api_secret.title: Kraken Spot API secret
api_secret.description: Leave blank if you left the API key blank.
